title: Site libraries: UKHSA Knowledge and Library Services
body: "We have 3 libraries, at our Chilton, Colindale and Porton sites - these are all accessible by UKHSA staff. All libraries offer printing, photocopying, study spaces and comfortable seating. There are learning and development and wellbeing titles available in each library’s collection. Addresses and contact details are listed below.  All UKHSA staff can borrow, renew and return books using the self-issue kiosks in each library. Log in to the kiosk with your library catalogue account. Your username is the first part of your email address before the @ sign. Reset your password if you do not know it.  Chilton  Resources The Chilton library contains a specialist book collection and an archive of print journals and reports. The focus is on radiation and environmental hazards. The collection includes:   Centre for Radiation, Chemical and Environmental Hazards (CRCE) research  legacy publications by the National Radiological Protection Board (NRPB)  outreach collection for UKHSA staff promoting science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM) in schools and at events   Contact details  Telephone: 020 368 20600  Address: Chilton Library UK Health Security Agency Chilton   OX11 0RQ  Points of Contact:  Librarian: John.Trevor-Allen@ukhsa.gov.uk  Assistant Librarian: Dorothy.Hirsch@ukhsa.gov.uk  Colindale  Resources The Colindale library houses a specialist book collection, an archive of print journals and a training room. The collection includes:    a comprehensive microbiology collection  rare medical history books  archival material from previous organisations, including Public Health Laboratory Service (PHLS), Health Protection Agency (HPA) and Public Health England (PHE)   Contact details  Telephone: 020 368 20600  Address: Colindale Library UK Health Security Agency 61 Colindale Avenue   London  NW9 5EQ  Point of Contact:  Librarian: Tom.Pink@ukhsa.gov.uk  Porton  Resources  The library at Porton has a wide range of books covering current research areas, including:   novel and dangerous pathogens  vaccine development  disaster management  zoonoses   Contact details  Telephone: 020 368 20600  Address: Porton Library UK Health Security Agency Manor Farm Road Porton Down Salisbury Wiltshire SP4 0JG  Point of Contact:  Librarian: Ana.Williams@ukhsa.gov.uk  Feedback This is a new service. Help us improve it by providing feedback.  "
